query: 规模增长最快的前二十只基金里，本年以来收益率最高的是哪只

args.sql:
WITH ranked_sizes AS (
  SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fund_code ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
  FROM fund_size
),
size_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    fund_code,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn=1 THEN fund_size END) AS latest_size,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn=2 THEN fund_size END) AS prev_size
  FROM ranked_sizes
  WHERE rn <= 2
  GROUP BY fund_code
  HAVING prev_size IS NOT NULL
),
growth_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    fund_code,
    latest_size - prev_size AS size_growth
  FROM size_growth
  ORDER BY size_growth DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT 
  p.fund_code AS '基金代码',
  p.fund_name AS '基金名称',
  g.size_growth AS '规模增长',
  ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS '本年以来收益率(%)'
FROM fund_performance p
JOIN growth_ranked g ON p.fund_code = g.fund_code
WHERE p.period = '本年以来'
ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC
LIMIT 1;

plan.rationale: 先计算每只基金最新两期规模差值，取差值最大的前20名，再从中找出本年以来收益率最高的基金。

generated_sql_result.基金名称: 华夏中证电网设备主题ETF

notes: 规模增长定义为基金最新报告日期规模减去上一报告日期规模，按此差值降序取前20名
若基金只有一个规模记录则无法计算增长，自动排除
规模日期未指定，使用每个基金各自的最新和次新日期
业绩期间未指定，默认为'本年以来'
先计算每只基金最新两期规模差值，取差值最大的前20名，再从中找出本年以来收益率最高的基金。
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
